question: q02
statement: Most reported sightings mistake other hornets for the Vespa mandarinia. Use only the data set file provided, and possibly the image files provided, to create, analyze, and discuss a model that predicts the likelihood of a mistaken classification.
methods: 只用官方 Positive ID / Negative ID 标签训练确定性留出分类器；特征包含坐标、月份、提交延迟、图片/视频映射、报告文本 TF-IDF、标本和蜂群损失关键词，以及距训练阳性点距离。

data_source.root: /Users/wuxiaojun/code/Math-Modeling-World/docs/mcm-2015-2025/official_assets_extracted/2021/Problem Data- Confirming the Buzz about Hornets/2021_MCM_Problem_C_Data

classification_model.model: deterministic split + TF-IDF report text + image metadata + date/coordinate features + distance to training positive sightings + class-weighted logistic regression
classification_model.assumption_warning: Only 14 official positive IDs are available, so interval uncertainty is large even when the holdout ranking is strong.
